props.title: Let’s talk design systems at Converge this October
props.description: We’re going to the Converge design systems conference on October 3 and 4 to chat about all things UI. There’s a great speaker line-up. We hope to see you there!

props.title: Let’s talk design systems at Converge this October
props.author: Paul Love
props.content:
A small but exciting update: We’re going to be back in sunny Brighton to attend [Converge](https://zeroheight.com/events/converge/) this October. Given its billing as Europe’s biggest design system conference, we’d be remiss if we didn’t.

## Essential details

- Wednesday, October 2 to Friday, October 4, 2024
- Brighton Dome, Brighton, BN1 1UE ([Map](https://maps.app.goo.gl/pTpN21pU1c16hGWr7))
- [Ticket information](https://ti.to/zeroheight/converge-2024)


## When to find us

Chris, Scott and I will be there to chat about all things design system, and UI in general. We’ll be at the conference bit on Thursday and Friday, but not the workshop on Wednesday. 

[Tickets](https://ti.to/zeroheight/converge-2024) are still available, and the speaker line-up looks fantastic. The Brighton Dome is worth the price of admission alone. An easy event to recommend — hopefully we’ll see you there!
props.standfirst: We’re going to the Converge design systems conference on October 3 and 4 to chat about all things UI.
